'''Martz''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They commanded the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]] ''[[Prosecutor]]'', which was commandeered by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] mercenaries roughly [[21 BBY/Legends|one year]] into the war. They were presumed dead, most likely killed by the Trandoshan forces.<ref name="RepCom" />

==Behind the scenes==
Martz was mentioned in the [[2005]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]''. In the French and German versions of ''Star Wars: Republic Commando'', Martz is instead referred to as "Stinnet."<ref name="RepCom" /> In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', Martz in identified as "Stinnett."<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|III|46|''Prosecutor''}}</ref>
